items.title: 110-year-old tech giant reveals a rare quantum edge
items.description: Quantum Computing felt like Star Trek for the most part, but today it’s edging toward spreadsheets. Earlier this year, Google’s Willow chip showed error rates are efficiently bending in the right direction. Still, now International Business Machines Corporation (IBM), one of the bellwethers in the ...

items.title: Adam Christensen Joins BambooHR as CMO to Lead Brand and Growth Strategy
items.description: BambooHR®, the leading people intelligence platform for unified HR, payroll, and benefits, today announced the appointment of Adam Christensen as the company's first-ever Chief Marketing Officer. As CMO, Christensen will lead BambooHR's global marketing organization, unifying brand, growth, and product marketing to expand the company's reach.

items.title: Amazon’s OpenAI Deal Is Boosting AI Stocks. The Rest of the Market Is Struggling.
items.description: Stocks linked to the artificial intelligence rally were pretty much the only winners during Monday’s session. The Dow fell 410 points, or 0.9%. The S&P 500 was down 0.2%, but only 67 of its members were rising.

items.title: This AI Stock Is Cheaper Than AMD and Crushing It in Returns
items.description: While AMD’s prospects remain strong, other semiconductor players are offering better value.

items.title: Apptio Unveils Next-Generation FinOps Solutions Designed to Redefine How Cloud Leaders Manage and Optimize Investments in the AI Era
items.description: Apptio, an IBM company (NYSE: IBM), today unveiled next-generation FinOps solutions from IBM Cloudability and IBM Kubecost designed to enhance visibility and optimize cloud costs across complex, AI-driven environments.
